---
title: Teaching
slug: teaching/
output: 
  html_document: 
    keep_md: yes
---

## Graduate

 - Microeconomics II (Game Theory, Phd): Practice, 2022-23 & 2023-24. University of Alicante

## Undergraduate

 - Economic Growth: Practice, 2022-23. University of Alicante.
 - Game Theory: Practice, 2020-21. University of Alicante.
 - Mathematics I: Practice, 2021-22 & 2023-24. University of Alicante.
 - Analytical Instruments for the Study of Law (Introduction to Statistics & Game Theory): Theory and Practice, 2017-18. Pompeu Fabra University.
